title: elaphoglossum fonkii
intro: Elaphoglossum fonkii, a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, is a type of epiphytic plant that grows on other plants without harming them. Elaphoglossum fonkii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum fonkii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Elaphoglossum fonkii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some regions, it is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
